name: Americana Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: A few drops Green food coloring
1 Cup Heavy cream, whipped to top
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin with 1/2 cup sugar and salt in a saucepan.
2. Beat together egg yolks, lime juice, and water; stir into the gelatin mixture.
3. Cook over medium heat until boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat; stir in grated peel.
5. Add food coloring sparingly to achieve pale green color.
6. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
7. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
8. Fold gelatin mixture into beaten egg whites.
9. Fold in whipped cream.
10. Pile into cooled baked pastry shell.
11. Chill until firm.
12. Spread with additional whipped cream.
13. Edge with grated lime peel.
14. Sprinkle chopped pistachio nuts in the center.
15. Garnish with thinly sliced lime placed around the edge of the pie.
